en.extract:
The southern brown-throated weaver (Ploceus xanthopterus) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae.
It is found in southern Africa.

The '''southern brown-throated weaver''' ('''''Ploceus xanthopterus''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Ploceidae]].
It is found in southern Africa.

==Gallery==
<gallery mode = packed heights = 130px>
Southern brown-throated weaver (Ploceus xanthopterus castaneigula) male.jpg|''P. x. castaneigula'', Namibia
Southern brown-throated weaver (Ploceus xanthopterus castaneigula) male building nest.jpg|''P. x. castaneigula'', Namibia
</gallery>
